base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of magic_vfx_atlas — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1987 final fantasy. Spell VFX atlas — ~8 rows × 8 cols of per-element spell effects (FIRE/BLIZ/LIT/NUKE + HRM/CURE/LIFE/DIA white magic + STAR bursts). Each spell has 2-3 animation frames. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Spell VFX atlas — ~8 rows × 8 cols of per-element spell effects (FIRE/BLIZ/LIT/NUKE + HRM/CURE/LIFE/DIA white magic + STAR bursts). Each spell has 2-3 animation frames
